summary: Tiger /apps read path changed the metric contract for CCU growth and momentum, and Tiger lacked the old growth columns/formula. The fix restores the ccu_tier_assignments growth contract, rebuilds the apps projection, and adds a snapshot backfill utility.
why_this_tier: Touches DB correctness, API/query contracts, frontend rendering, sync pipelines, and cross-surface metric semantics. Subagents were not spawned because session-level tool rules only allow them when the user explicitly asks for delegation.

reproduction_status.summary: Tiger ccu_trend_7d_pct and apps_page_projection ccu_growth_7d_percent were null for all checked rows, while Supabase ccu_tier_assignments still had non-null growth values.

db_checks.label: Tiger app trends and projection coverage
db_checks.result: metrics.app_trends had 0 non-null ccu_trend_7d_pct rows; metrics.apps_page_projection had 0 non-null ccu_growth_7d_percent rows.

db_checks.label: Supabase old growth coverage
db_checks.result: public.ccu_tier_assignments had 29,099 non-null ccu_growth_7d_percent rows and 48,485 non-null ccu_growth_30d_percent rows.

root_cause_hypotheses: Confirmed: Tiger /apps sourced 7d growth from metrics.app_trends.ccu_trend_7d_pct, which was unpopulated.
Confirmed: Tiger recalculate_ccu_tiers did not carry forward Supabase growth columns or formulas.
Confirmed: Tiger apps projection included delisted rows that old Supabase /apps excluded.
Likely: sparse Tiger snapshot history made sparklines and growth incomplete until backfill.
fix_options: Restore the old ccu_tier_assignments growth contract in Tiger and update /apps to read it.
Keep the new app_trends semantics and rename/reframe UI metrics.
Disable Tiger projection and fall back to direct ad hoc formulas.
recommended_fix: Restore the old ccu_tier_assignments growth contract in Tiger, rebuild the projection, backfill recent CCU snapshots, and keep /apps metric labels stable.
verification_plan: Post-migration read-only parity checks for growth non-null counts and sample appids
residual_risks: Production values will remain null until the Tiger SQL migration, CCU snapshot backfill, tier recalculation, and materialized view refresh are run with DB-write approval.
